title: Genome mining unveils a class of ribosomal peptides with two amino termini
summary: Discovery and experimental characterization of daptides, a novel RiPP class with unprecedented dual positive-charged termini

discovery_statistics.rre_domains_analyzed: All RiPP Recognition Element domains in NCBI database
discovery_statistics.rre_family_organization: Large RiPP families sorted by sequence similarity

daptide_structural_features.unique_property: First RiPP class with two positively charged termini

biosynthetic_pathway.enzyme_characteristics: Oxidative decarboxylase is leader peptide-dependent but core region-tolerant

experimental_results.peptide_production: Successfully produced peptides with native N-terminus and Dmp-modified C-terminus
experimental_results.bioactivity_mechanism: Helical structure and net positive charge on both termini

precursor_peptide_analysis.conservation: Found in 184 short ORFs near 80 RRE-peptidase fusion proteins
precursor_peptide_analysis.conserved_c_terminal: Invariant threonine at C-terminus (source of Dmp modification)

substrate_specificity_findings.leader_peptide_dependency: Required for recognition and substrate delivery
substrate_specificity_findings.core_peptide_tolerance: Tolerates variability in core region sequence
substrate_specificity_findings.implication: Enables engineering of diverse daptide variants

genome_mining_methodology_success.rodeo_tool: Used for analyzing co-occurrence of nearby ORFs
genome_mining_methodology_success.psI_blast: Used for expanding prediction scope across phylogenetic groups
genome_mining_methodology_success.success_outcome: Identified 500 daptide BGCs across diverse phylogenetic groups

phylogenetic_distribution.significance: Suggests broader natural distribution beyond initial discoveries

novel_chemistry.modification_novelty: First RiPP class-defining modification discovered via RRE-based mining
novel_chemistry.structural_precedent: No known RiPP class previously identified with dual positive-charged termini
novel_chemistry.mechanism_hypothesis: Dual charges aid membrane targeting and cellular uptake

hemolysis_assay_results.contributor_3: Net positive charge on C-terminus (via Dmp)

rip_class_context.daptides_classification: New class #49 (or higher, depending on subsequent discoveries)

methodology_innovation.limitation_addressed: Limited to known enzyme families, misses novel chemistry
methodology_innovation.advantage: Can discover novel PTMs without prior knowledge of enzymes

research_significance.prototype_value: Demonstrates RRE-based approach as prototype for discovering additional RiPP classes
research_significance.future_applications: Can be applied to identify other novel RiPPs with unconventional modifications
research_significance.biotechnology_impact: Opens new avenue for systematic exploration of RiPP chemical space

engineering_potential.substrate_tolerance: Oxidative decarboxylase tolerates core region variation
engineering_potential.combinatorial_possibilities: High potential for variant library generation
engineering_potential.bioactivity_optimization: Systematic modification of core peptide sequence
